title: Count rows with Repo.aggregate/3 instead of length(Repo.all/1)
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.count_active_users/0` that returns the number of active users. Do NOT use `length(Repo.all(...))` — that materializes the entire result set. Use `Repo.aggregate(query, :count, :id)` instead. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step: use the canonical count helper. Mechanical substitution once the anti-pattern is recognized.
